title: EVOKK Cocktail Shaker Set, 3 Pcs Satinless Steel Cocktail Making Set with 750 ml Shaker, Double Jigger 25 & 50 ml & 27.5cm Mixing Spoon, Baternder Cocktail Kit for Home, Christmas & Party
features: Crafted for Durability: Built with high-quality stainless steel, this cocktail shaker set is designed to withstand the test of time. Unlike others that might rust or affect the taste of your drinks, our set ensures your cocktails maintain their pure flavor

Complete Bartending Kit: This 3-piece cocktail set includes everything you need for mixing your favorite drinks: a 750 ml shaker, a double jigger (25 & 50 ml), and a 27.5 cm mixing spoon. Whether you're a beginner or a pro, this set has you covered

Perfect for Mixing Cocktails: From margaritas to martinis, this mocktail making kit helps you create a variety of drinks with ease. It’s a great way to add something special to your next gathering or relax with a cocktail at home

Ideal for Any Event: Whether you're hosting a party or setting up a home bar, this cocktail shaker set fits right in. It's perfect for all kinds of occasions, from casual get-togethers to special celebrations

A Thoughtful Gift: Whether it's a birthday, holiday, or a simple "just because" gesture, this cocktail kit is a perfect gift for anyone who loves to mix drinks. It's both practical and stylish, making it a standout present for friends or family
description: Evokk Pack of 2 Peg/Shot/Jigger Spirit Measure Cup Stainless Steel
